assertion_results.text: Each non-documentation, non-testing task file contains all required template sections
Task count is between 3 and 12 inclusive
Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
Impact map lists concrete, specific changes
Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name
Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections
File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest
Implementation Notes in every non-documentation, non-testing task reference specific file paths and code patterns
Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
For each task created, a description digest is produced with format-tagged SHA-256 hash
Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md
Priority is inherited by created tasks when set on Feature
fixVersions are inherited by created tasks when set on Feature
A summary of inherited field propagation is produced
A documentation task is generated because the feature description has Documentation Considerations
Testing tasks are generated from the testing readiness template — exactly 2 testing tasks
Each testing task depends on all implementation tasks
